Local media reported that the incident prompted a ground stop at the airport, halting all landings until around 8.30 am. Goedeking said a combination of very careful driving, the "shepherd banging his crook" on a railing, as well as "lots of honking the car" got him and his companions past the horde of furry creatures in the end.
